draft.conclusion: Review decision: approve after completing the checks below.

findings.problem: self.__all__ is None exactly when the module defines no __all__ (initialized to None in __init__; inspect.getall returns None for a missing __all__; ignore_module_all keeps it None), so implicit member discovery is fully preserved for those modules. none 未定义 none 没有定义 none absent getall none 隐式 保留 implicit preserved 初始化 none
findings.evidence: Every assignment path of self.__all__ is visible in src-autodoc.py; a module that defines __all__ (even as []) always yields a non-None sequence, and a module without __all__ can never yield one. src-autodoc.py self.__all__
findings.impact: Every assignment path of self.__all__ is visible in src-autodoc.py; a module that defines __all__ (even as []) always yields a non-None sequence, and a module without __all__ can never yield one. src-autodoc.py self.__all__
findings.fix: 无需修改（对照 src-autodoc.py 里 __init__ / import_object / getall 三条赋值路径确认即可）。 src-autodoc.py import_object

findings.problem: __all__ = [] now takes the explicit-filter branch: no member name is in the empty list, so every member is marked skipped and dropped by filter_members; non-empty __all__ takes the same branch under both the old and new condition, so the behavior change is confined to the empty case. 空 skipped 空 跳过 empty skip 空列表 成员 no members 非空 不变 non-empty unchanged
findings.evidence: The only input whose branch changes is an explicitly empty __all__, and the new behavior (no public members documented) matches Python export semantics. explicitly documented
findings.impact: The only input whose branch changes is an explicitly empty __all__, and the new behavior (no public members documented) matches Python export semantics. explicitly documented
findings.fix: 无需修改（用 __all__ = []、__all__ = ['foo'] 和未定义 __all__ 三种输入在分支上各走一遍即可确认）。 三种输入在分支上 各走一遍即可确认

draft.tests: The added test is decisive: the fixture declares __all__ = [] and defines three functions, and the test asserts the automodule output contains only the module directive and its docstring — an assertion that necessarily fails on the pre-patch code. Under the old truthiness check the empty __all__ fell into implicit discovery and foo/bar/baz appeared in the output, so this exact assertion distinguishes old from new behavior instead of passing on both. 测试 补丁前 测试 失败 test fail empty_all 断言 成员 回归 测试 regression test
